articles.title: Football quiz: Name every Scottish champion
articles.summary: The Scottish Premiership will be decided on the final day and you can follow all the drama on the BBC Sport website and app.

articles.title: Three Lions - the football anthem that united a nation
articles.summary: BBC Sport speaks to Three Lions co-creator David Baddiel about the song that united a nation.

articles.title: Football quiz: Name this season's top 10 WSL scorers
articles.summary: The final round of Women's Super League fixtures takes place on Saturday and we're hoping for goals.

articles.title: Celtic & Hearts set for titanic title duel
articles.summary: A remarkable Scottish Premiership campaign concludes with Hearts and Celtic going head-to-head for the title on Saturday.

articles.title: Guardiola insists he has 'one more year' on Man City deal
articles.summary: Manager Pep Guardiola insists he has "one more year" remaining on his contract at Manchester City as speculation continues over his future at the club.

articles.title: Aston Villa secure Champions League spot with win over Liverpool
articles.summary: Ollie Watkins scores twice as Aston Villa move above Liverpool into fourth in the Premier League and seal qualification for next season's Champions League.

articles.title: Villa defeat 'frustrating' for everyone - Slot
articles.summary: Liverpool manager Arne Slot acknowledges his side's 4-2 defeat at Aston Villa is frustrating for himself, the players and the fans as they now need to win against Brentford on the final day of the sea...

articles.title: Fantastic achievement to reach Champions League - Emery
articles.summary: Aston Villa manager Unai Emery says his side can now play the Europa League final without the added pressure of needing to secure Champions League qualification after a 4-2 win over Liverpool ensures ...

articles.title: Watch the goals as Partick Thistle reach play-off final
articles.summary: Watch the goals as Partick Thistle beat Dunfermline Athletic to reach the Scottish Premiership play-off final, where they will face St Mirren.

articles.title: The impossible job? The pressure of refereeing Scotland's title decider
articles.summary: In a league dominated by Celtic and Rangers, referees are always accused of favouring one or the other. And that means intense pressure for officials in Scotland.

articles.title: Three more VAR errors take mistake tally to 23
articles.summary: Three more video assistant referee errors are confirmed by the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel, taking the total number this season to 23.

articles.title: Why Newcastle's history makers are breaking up
articles.summary: Newcastle United ended a 70-year wait for a major domestic trophy by winning the League Cup last season but further members of that side look set to leave.

articles.title: Everybody wants Hearts to win - Celtic boss O'Neill
articles.summary: Celtic manager Martin O'Neill believes "everybody wants Hearts to win" as he prepares his side for Saturday's Scottish Premiership title decider.

articles.title: Zaha omitted from Ivory Coast World Cup squad
articles.summary: Former Crystal Palace forward Wilfried Zaha is left out of Ivory Coast's World Cup squad, but four current Premier League players are included.

articles.title: Hearts ready to 'rip up script' in title showdown
articles.summary: Head coach Derek McInnes has faith that Hearts can "rip up the script" and prevail in a "pure box office" final-day showdown at Celtic Park with the Scottish Premiership title on the line.

highlights.title: Premier League highlights this week - Week Highlights

articles.title: McIlroy fights back into major mix as Scheffler stutters, DeChambeau exits
articles.summary: Rory McIlroy charged back into major contention with an impressive second-round fightback at the PGA Championship, as Scottie Scheffler failed to build on his fast start in Pennsylvania.

articles.title: McIlroy back in contention at PGA Championship with McNealy, Smalley leading
articles.summary: Rory McIlroy fired himself back in contention at the PGA Championship with a three-under-par second round as he chased down Alex Smalley and Maverick McNealy.

articles.title: What a difference a day makes! | McIlroy's hilarious response to viral 's***!' answer
articles.summary: Rory McIlroy gave a hilarious response to a journalist who asked him to compare his first two rounds at the PGA Championship.

articles.title: McIlroy questions course set-up after boosting back-to-back major hopes
articles.summary: Rory McIlroy insists he is still in the running to claim back-to-back major titles after climbing up a congested leaderboard to charge back into PGA Championship contention.

articles.title: Middlesbrough want Southampton kicked out of play-offs over Spygate
articles.summary: Middlesbrough demand Southampton's expulsion from the Championship play-offs over spying allegations.

articles.title: Farke says Leeds must match his ambition
articles.summary: Leeds head coach Daniel Farke says he is "not the right choice" to remain in charge of the club if they fail to match his ambition in the summer.

articles.title: Championship clubs back new squad spending rules
articles.summary: Championship clubs vote in favour of moving to a new financial framework of Squad Cost Rules (SCR) from next season.

articles.title: Woad charges into LPGA Tour mix as Hull tumbles after bogey burst
articles.summary: Lottie Woad charged within a shot of the halfway lead at the LPGA Tour’s Kroger Queen City Championship, as defending champion Charley Hull stumbled with a nightmare bogey burst.

articles.title: Smith delivers another priceless performance as Wigan dominate Leeds
articles.summary: Harry Smith delivered another priceless performance as resurgent Wigan served notice of their Betfred Super League title intentions with a dominant 24-4 win over Leeds at the Brick Community Stadium.

articles.title: Thomas questions slow play warning as Scheffler criticises 'absurd' pins
articles.summary: Justin Thomas questioned the decision for his group to be warned over their pace of play during a challenging second round at the PGA Championship.

articles.title: Stokes pours more misery on axed England Test team-mate Crawley
articles.summary: Ben Stokes poured more misery on axed England Test team-mate Zak Crawley but Kent got on top against Durham at Beckenham in the County Championship on Friday.

League One highlights this week - Week Highlights

articles.title: Notts County book place at Wembley after holding off Chesterfield
articles.summary: Notts County secured their place in the League Two play-off final after a 0-0 draw with Chesterfield at Meadow Lane saw them go through 1-0 on aggregate.

articles.title: Salford book their ticket to Wembley in dramatic fashion!
articles.summary: Highlights of Salford City against Grimsby in the League Two semi-final second leg play-off.

highlights.title: League Two highlights this week - Week Highlights

articles.title: 'Out of shape' Lukaku in Belgium World Cup squad
articles.summary: Romelu Lukaku has been named in Belgium's World Cup squad, despite manager Rudi Garcia saying he is "out of shape".

articles.title: Lamouchi leaves Sassi out of Tunisia World Cup squad
articles.summary: Tunisia manager Sabri Lamouchi leaves midfielder Ferjani Sassi - who has 101 caps - out of the country's squad for the 2026 World Cup.

highlights.title: World Cup highlights this week - Week Highlights

standout_moments.moment: Salford book their ticket to Wembley in dramatic fashion!
